content: All 3,461 products are intact (0 archived); 185 have no internal reference code. The gaps come from multiple coding schemes and the non-transactional sequence, not deletion - no products were lost.

arguments.code:
pb = call('odoo', {'operation':'playbook','name':'records-missing'})
total = call('odoo', {'model':'product.product','method':'search_count','args':[[]]})
arch = call('odoo', {'model':'product.product','method':'search_count','args':[[['active','in',[True, False]]]]})
